sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n24629" key="diaglufh/" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">δια-γλῠφή</orth>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ἡ</gen>, <sense id="n24629.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">scooping out,</tr_> <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0722.tlg001:49:4:28" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Orib.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">49.4.28</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
